command_redacted: aws configure list 2>/dev/null || echo "aws cli not found"; cat ~/.aws/credentials 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "no credentials file"
aws sts get-caller-identity 2>&1; echo "---REGION---"; echo "AWS_REGION=$AWS_REGION AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=$AWS_DEFAULT_REGION"; echo "---PROFILES---"; aws configure list-profiles 2>&1 | head
description: Check AWS CLI identity and region

command_redacted: aws configure set region us-east-1 && echo "default region set to:" && aws configure get region
description: Set AWS CLI default region to us-east-1

command_redacted: aws sts get-caller-identity --output json 2>&1 && aws configure list 2>&1
description: Check which AWS account and profile is active
